tluaNoTry.tlua(3,1): error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'try'.
tluaNoTry.tlua(3,5): error TLUA1128: Declaration or statement expected.
tluaNoTry.tlua(5,3): error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'catch'.
tluaNoTry.tlua(5,10): error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'e'.
tluaNoTry.tlua(5,13): error TLUA1005: ';' expected.
tluaNoTry.tlua(6,18): error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'e'.
tluaNoTry.tlua(7,3): error TLUA1434: Unexpected keyword or identifier.
tluaNoTry.tlua(7,3): error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'finally'.
tluaNoTry.tlua(7,11): error TLUA1128: Declaration or statement expected.


==== tluaNoTry.tlua (10 errors) ====
    // try/catch/finally are removed. The words are ordinary identifiers, so this
    // reports ordinary syntax errors without constructing legacy AST nodes.
    try {
    ~~~
!!! error TLUA1434: Unexpected keyword or identifier.
    ~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'try'.
        ~
!!! error TLUA1128: Declaration or statement expected.
      throw "boom";
    } catch (e) {
      ~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'catch'.
             ~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'e'.
                ~
!!! error TLUA1005: ';' expected.
      local caught = e;
                     ~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'e'.
    } finally {
      ~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA1434: Unexpected keyword or identifier.
      ~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'finally'.
              ~
!!! error TLUA1128: Declaration or statement expected.
      local cleaned = true;
    }
